title: Biphasic extraction metabolites in algal matrix or periphyton
author: Mélissa ME EON
materials: PREPARATION OF EXTRACTION MIXTURES – UPLC GRADE (HERE FOR 60 REPLICATES!) • Prepare an MTBE:MeOH mixture (3:1, v:v) => 150 mL stored at 4 °C for maximum one week • Prepare a mixture H2O:MeOH (3:1, v:v) => 100 mL stored at 4 °C for maximum one week MTBE: Sigma Chromasolv 99.8% for HPLC 100mL (smallest available) (34875-100mL) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #34875-100ML Methanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M3641 MilliQ water Contributed by users

steps.title: pre Extraction
steps.instruction: pre Extraction. + IS post Extraction o Spike (

steps.title: PREPARATION OF MIXTURES FOR DOPING
steps.instruction: PREPARATION OF MIXTURES FOR DOPING: SST mix ( 50 Parts per Million (PPM) ) + pesticide mix ( 3.3 Parts per Million (PPM) )mix IS pesticides ( 2.5 Parts per Million (PPM) ) + mix IS metabo ( 50 Parts per Million (PPM) ) + PE (15:0) ( 100 Parts per Million (PPM) ) • Ultrasound 00:05:00 at Room temperature

steps.title: PREPARATION OF CRUSHED ICE OR COLD...
steps.instruction: PREPARATION OF CRUSHED ICE OR COLD BLOCKS • Prepare ice with the ice machine continuously throughout the extraction • Place cold blocks at -80 °C as well as microtube racks

steps.title: PREPARATION OF BALL TUBES AND VIALS...
steps.instruction: PREPARATION OF BALL TUBES AND VIALS All these steps can be done the day before. • Annotate all tubes • Add 150 mg (± 10mg) of 0.5mm beads to each 2mL tube • Annotate all 1.8mL amber stock vials (duplicate for lipophilic and hydrophilic fractions)

steps.title: o Lab sample
steps.instruction: o Lab sample: 10 µL IS of the test compound + 10 µL IS metabo + 10 µL PE (15:

steps.title: o Spike on matrix (or solvent if matrix not available)
steps.instruction: o Spike on matrix (or solvent if matrix not available): Extraction yield Spike 1: • Pre-extraction: 10 µL mix SST + 10 µL mix Pest + PE (15:

steps.title: o Procedural blank
steps.instruction: o Procedural blank: solvent only o Blind blank: solvent + 10 µL All IS In order to guarantee the cold chain: • For 00:15:00 : Place the tubes and MTBE:MeOH solution at -80 °C ; H20:MeOH solutions at -20 °C • Start the Fast Temp on the centrifuge 4 °C

steps.title: EXTRACTION 1 Under hood and on ice
steps.instruction: EXTRACTION 1 Under hood and on ice: Add 1 mL of MTBE:MeOH (3:1) per tube • Cycle to Fast prep: 00:00:15 at 6.5 m/s • Place the samples in ice or at -80 °C for 00:03:00 • Do a second cycle in Fast prep: 00:00:15 at 6.5 m/s • Place the samples in ice or at -80 °C for 00:03:00 Under hood and on ice: Add 650 µL of H2O:MeOH • Do a third cycle in Fast prep: 00:00:15 at 6.5 m/s • Place the samples in ice or at -80 °C for 00:03:00 • Centrifugation: 12000 rpm, 4 °C, 5 minutes Under the hood and on ice, recover the phases in vials stocks (amber 1.8mL) => 500 µL lipophilic above; 600 µL hydrophilic below using a micropipette Save the base for extraction 2 FastPrep-24 5G (Bead beater, MP Biomedicals, 116005500, https://uk.mpbio.com/fastprep-24-5g-instrument )

steps.title: EXTRACTION 2 Under hood and on ice
steps.instruction: EXTRACTION 2 Under hood and on ice: Add 700 µL of MTBE:MeOH (3:1) per tube • Cycle to Fast prep: 00:00:15 at 6.5 m/s • Place the samples in ice or at -80 °C for 00:03:00 • Do a second cycle in Fast prep: 00:00:15 at 6.5 m/s • Place the samples in ice or at -80 °C for 00:03:00 Under hood and on ice: Add 455 µL of H2O:MeOH Do a third cycle in Fast prep: 00:00:15 at 6.5 m/s • Place the samples in ice or at -80 °C for 00:03:00 Centrifugation: 12000 rpm, 4 °C, 5 minutes Under the hood and on ice, recover the phases under the hood in the same vials => 600 µL lipophilic above; 700 µL hydrophilic below using a micropipette End of the process • Weigh the amber stocks after transfer of the extracts =>Theoretically: 1.1 mL lipo vs 1.3 mL hydro •Doping o Spike 1 & 2 • Post-extraction: 10 µL IS metabo + 10 µL IS pesticides • Store all vials at -80 °C

steps.title: HYDROPHILIC FRACTION UPLC-TOF • 00:05:00 ultrasound...
steps.instruction: HYDROPHILIC FRACTION UPLC-TOF • 00:05:00 ultrasound • 500 µL transfer into clear vials • Evaporate solvant in Genevac : 30 °C , 00:30:00 hydro mode • Add 100 µL H2O:ACN 50:50 and transfer into insert Acetonitrile ULC-MS Biosolve Catalog #0001204101BS • QC pool preparation and dilutions =>Pool 10 µL of each sample in amber vial (without insert) and prepare QC/2 QC/4 Boosting the QC pool with leucine 1ppm at 1/100 • Calibration range preparation: SST mix + Pest mix + PE (15:0) with fixed concentration IS metabo and Pest (Genevac EZ-2, EZ-2, https://www.spscientific.com/Products/Centrifugal_Evaporators___Sample_Concentrators/Genevac/EZ-2_Series/EZ-2_Series/, https://s3.amazonaws.com/pr-journal/7mi2jk6.png )

steps.title: LIPOPHILIC FRACTION UPLC-TOF • 00:05:00 ultrasound...
steps.instruction: LIPOPHILIC FRACTION UPLC-TOF • 00:05:00 ultrasound • 500 µL transfer into clear vials • Evaporate solvant in Genevac : 30 °C , 00:20:00 lipo mode • Add 100 µL ISO:ACN 50:50 and transfer into insert Isopropanol HyperSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) QC pool preparation and dilutions =>Pool 10 µL of each sample in amber vial (without insert) and prepare QC/2 QC/4 Boosting the QC pool with leucine 1ppm at 1/100 • Calibration range preparation: SST mix + Pest mix + PE (15:0) with fixed concentration IS metabo and Pest

steps.title: LIPOPHILIC FRACTION HPLC-MS/MS • 00:05:00 ultrasound...
steps.instruction: LIPOPHILIC FRACTION HPLC-MS/MS • 00:05:00 ultrasound • 125 µL transfer in insert in clear vials • Dry evaporation under N2 flow at Room temperature • Addition of the injection solvent for final dilution at 1/2: 250 µL of isopropanol + 50 µL IS polar lipids for subsequent analysis of glycolipids and phospholipids for example
